{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220658299AE0C3A680FFEDB4EF93"}"},"total":7009},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496083438735835929","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书写的真心好看，主角有脑子，有逻辑，有正义感，写的有那种奥特曼，经历过许多事的沧桑感，不像那些好像女频穿过来的主角一样。就一句话，太牛逼了。","text_exts":[{"e":32,"s":29,"text":"奥特曼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774133909EDB4EF93%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227496083438735835929%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227459639201990986777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745321683,"group_id":"7459639201990986777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"串子","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9sMQjOVoNhHsiN4dy8Vnaar8BKphsVpCnKXfZmnIc9S","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1ae5375b9c3641f1a880c09c50421c8e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703574&x-signature=FyrpXcoMIdF9V1K265LW7LiacUA%3D","user_id":"1121940948652040","user_name":"路过的血鸦连长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1121940948652040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459639201990986777","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP无女主+无敌+人设在线+爽文+高燃】
当奥特曼抛去特摄片经费的限制，出现在现实中，出现在不属于特摄的宇宙中，究竟会展现出什么样的实力？
在神仙打架的光之国主宇宙，夏树只是一名“普普通通”的宇宙警备队队员，比不过那些天天开挂的神仙。
但当他出了特摄片场，来到其他宇宙，却发现，原来你们都这么弱啊！
环太平洋世界：试问，体重两千多吨的怪兽，在体重四万多吨的我面前，究竟要怎么收力才不至于一拳秒杀？

怪兽8号世界：区区几头怪兽而已！都闪开，我来让你们看看什么叫做真正的一拳超人！
传奇哥斯拉世界：零号怪兽王者基多拉？看我用八分光轮把你做成刺身？不够？不够那就十八分光轮！我光之锯人专治各种不服！
机动奥特曼世界：什么？星团评议会把光之国封印了？你等着，我把主宇宙的光之国拉过来，让你们看看什么叫降维打击！

nt":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18528,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":19731},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7527953888604373822","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角的性格比较开放,但是三观绝对的正,这本书不仅限于爽文那么简单,这和老逢魔的伪奥还有作者另一本书后山银河可以说是番茄里的三大优秀奥特同人文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752742754,"group_id":"7459639201990986777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无能的，懒惰的，不好的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzbYSR570aLggej127A0QbyGkr7cqbYJd1YliMcjNvon","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3ac014c5b4414574a59f44d9e6a49878~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705694&x-signature=8fEjGQ1zjYnLrgz4teT9WqOyNts%3D","user_id":"3153843732626141","user_name":"坦特"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3153843732626141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459639201990986777","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP无女主+无敌+人设在线+爽文+高燃】

PS：作者已有一百五十万字完结作品战绩可查，人品保证不太监不烂尾，可放心追更。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9abdeac1b8d898a8714aa88a5b444e1f","author":"菌不浪","author_id":"","book_id":"7459639201990986777","book_name":"奥特：从环太平洋开始无限横推","book_short_name":"点燃昔日之光","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459639405465043481","read_count":"74627","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1061559"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"498","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,奥特同人,无敌,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a41a30a449be5d077dd3e6620478070~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317909&x-signature=Eg2fvOTzEVuDgRcHnr2n1YlDjO0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2052121224559770","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"60"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220658299AE0C3A680FFEDB4EF93"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":67,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7102,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":24119},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468674653593289534","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大您好！真的太爱这本设定了！当奥特曼突破特摄片场在不同宇宙大显身手时，那种战力碾压的爽感简直冲破天际！男主身为穿越者却以奥特曼本体身份与人类文明互动，既保留了光之战士的纯粹又带着人间体的细腻，这种视角碰撞太戳我了！作者大大，我必须用力夸爆主角的塑造！你撕碎了传统特摄片对奥特曼的刻板滤镜——没有无脑牺牲的圣母心，没有对人类文明卑躬屈膝的妥协，而是以真正高维生命体的姿态与地球对话。我看的一版新奥特曼电影的字幕有一句是利匹亚平静地说出“如果你们敢伤害我的同伴，那我就会先杰顿一步把地球炸了！”时，那种神明般的理性威慑力让我寒毛倒竖！

这才是符合宇宙法则的真实奥特曼：用绝对实力建立秩序，用理性划定底线。人类不再是需要捧在手心的婴儿，而是必须直面高等文明规则的平等对话者。（环太平洋篇主角对艾伯特说三分钟能干什么？非常平静的反问道“那你认为我现在如果想要毁灭人类文明需要多久？”），简直把“神性暴烈”和“维度碾压”那种感觉写到了极致！

恳请保持这种锋利如八分光轮的叙事风格！比起温柔守护者，我脑海中幻想的是你笔下这种真实的奥特曼。期待看到更多文明博弈名场面——让人类在战栗中学会与神明共舞，才是真实系奥迷的终极浪漫啊！

简介里的在环太平洋手撕怪兽、EVA世界秒杀使徒、光之锯人料理基多拉这些脑洞，完美满足了我对"真实系奥特曼"的所有幻想——原来那些毁天灭地的技能放在现实维度真的能降维打击！

尤其是将光之国主宇宙设定为"神仙打架"，而其他片场变成新手村的设计，既保留了奥迷的情怀又开辟了全新战场。求继续保持这种幽默与热血齐飞的节奏！已经安利给所有特摄同好，期待看到更多宇宙警备队的跨界执法日常！（奥特比心.jpg）

PS：一想到简介说机动奥篇要召唤主宇宙光之国时，激动得捶床！请务必让佐菲队长带着M87光线来给星团评议会上一课！","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"奥特曼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774133909EDB4EF93%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227468674653593289534%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227459639201990986777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":202,"s":198,"text":"新奥特曼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%B0%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774133909EDB4EF93%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227468674653593289534%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227459639201990986777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%B0%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":343,"s":339,"text":"环太平洋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8E%AF%E5%A4%AA%E5%B9%B3%E6%B4%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774133909EDB4EF93%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227468674653593289534%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227459639201990986777%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%AF%E5%A4%AA%E5%B9%B3%E6%B4%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":531,"s":528,"text":"EVA","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=EVA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_li
